description: You are a systems analyst documenting a hospital patient management system. Using the existing Context Diagram in '~/Diagrams/hospital_dfd.drawio' and the specification in '~/Desktop/patient_system_spec.txt', decompose the system into a Level-0 DFD and a Level-1 DFD. The Level-0 DFD must be on a page named 'Level-0 DFD' and include processes 1.0 through 5.0, data stores D1 through D5, and all relevant external entities. The Level-1 DFD must be on a page named 'Level-1 Billing', decomposing Process 4.0 into sub-processes 4.1 through 4.4 and associated data stores. Use standard DFD notation (Circles/Ellipses for processes, Open Rectangles or Parallel Lines for data stores, Squares/Rectangles for entities) with labeled data flows. Export the final diagram as an SVG to '~/Diagrams/exports/hospital_dfd.svg'.
